title: Seeing the Multivariate Normal
tagline: From a 1D bell curve to marginals and conditionals
summary: An intuition-first interactive article that starts with the ordinary normal distribution, then builds a 2D Gaussian with live marginals, conditionals, and geometric explanations.
highlights: Start with a live 1D bell curve before moving into two dimensions.
Rotate and stretch a Gaussian cloud with direct control of covariance.
Drag slice lines to see marginals and conditionals update in sync.
